responsibility_statement: Accept typed content through ingress template

responsibility_statement: Invoke validator only for validating ingress

responsibility_statement: Ensure components host policy-defined mechanism semantics

responsibility_statement: Consume operational directives as administrative control

responsibility_statement: Preserve policy-conforming queue order

responsibility_statement: Observe registry readiness before handoff
